selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 信, 字母, 证书, 字面意义, 铅字, 学问, 出租人；vt. 写字母于, 在...上刻字母, 用字母标明
words.definition: n. a written message addressed to a person or organization

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 语言, 文字, 措辞
words.definition: n. a systematic means of communicating by the use of sounds or conventional symbols

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace
n. the event consisting of the start of something

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws
n. uncastrated adult male of domestic cattle
n. any of various large keen-sighted diurnal birds of prey noted for their broad wings and strong soaring flight
n. nocturnal bird of prey with hawk-like beak and claws and large head with front-facing eyes

words.translation: n. 英语；a. 英文的, 英国人的
words.definition: n. an Indo-European language belonging to the West Germanic branch; the official language of Britain and the United States and most of the commonwealth countrie
n. United States jazz musician who influenced the style of Louis Armstrong (1885-1938)
